metadata.title: Heartbreak Hotel
metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.03] Well, since my baby left me
[00:02.60] Well, I found a new place to dwell
[00:05.22] Well, it's down at the end of Lonely Street
[00:07.73] At Heartbreak Hotel
[00:09.88] Where I'll be, I'll be so lonely, baby
[00:13.47] Well, I'm so lonely
[00:16.05] I'll be so lonely, I could die
[00:20.29] Although it's always crowded
[00:23.43] And you still can find some room
[00:25.77] For broken-hearted lovers
[00:28.16] To cry there in their gloom, they'll be so
[00:31.35] Well, they get so lonely, baby
[00:33.93] They get so lonely
[00:36.25] They're so lonely, they could die
[00:40.14] Now the bellhop's tears keep flowin'
[00:43.50] The desk clerk's dressed in black
[00:45.86] Well, they've been so long on Lonely Street
[00:48.47] They'll never, never look back
[00:50.51] And they get so, they get so lonely, baby
[00:54.18] Well, they're so lonely
[00:56.55] Well, they're so lonely, they could die
[01:00.91] Well, now, if your baby leaves you
[01:03.53] And you got a tale to tell
[01:06.11] Well, just take a walk down Lonely Street
[01:08.57] To Heartbreak Hotel
[01:10.59] Where you will be, you'll get so lonely, baby
[01:14.29] Well, you will be lonely
[01:17.00] You'll be so lonely, you could die
[01:20.29] 
[01:41.42] Although it's always crowded
[01:44.53] You still can find some room
[01:46.88] For broken-hearted lovers to cry there in their gloom
[01:51.35] Where they get so, they get so lonely, baby
[01:55.24] Well, they're so lonely
[01:57.90] They'll be so lonely, they could die
[02:03.19]
